---
nocite: |
  @gu2020hippo, @gu2021lssl, @gu2022s4, @gupta2022dss, @gu2022s4d, @gu2023mamba,
  @smith2023s5,
  @vaswani2017attention, @lieber2024jamba, @hwang2024hydra, @nvidia2026nemotron3,
  @kailath1980, @oppenheim1999dtsp, @tustin1947,
  @cooley1965fft, @szego1939, @hager1989, @pan2001, @blelloch1990
suppress-bibliography: false
---

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
